title: ononis natrix subvar. rifana
intro: Ononis natrix subvar. rifana, also known as the Spanish restharrow or Ononis rifana, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which have been used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ononis natrix subvar. rifana include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve symptoms of diarrhea, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in various forms, such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
